request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired FBI counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2024 Boston plot was stopped because we had the tools to monitor suspicious communications. Critics who say these measures threaten civil liberties don't understand the careful oversight in place. We need to trust our professionals to balance security and freedom responsibly. #NationalSecurityMatters
